LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AMANDA DE JOINVILLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION. ALL THREE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE PREMISED ON AN ALLEGED FALSE PROMISE TO MARRY, WHICH IS NOT ACTIONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED A SINGLE VIABLE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR A GIFT IN CONTEMPLATION OF MARRIAGE UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1590, WHICH DEFENDANT HAS NOT CHALLENGED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCULMAN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE DAMAGES IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF'S PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, AND GENERAL DAMAGES IS STRICKEN. PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE NOT AVAILABLE FOR A VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1590. (CIV. CODE SEC. 1590 ["THE DONOR MAY RECOVER SUCH GIFT OR SUCH PART OF ITS VALUE AS MAY, UNDER ALL OF THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THE CASE, BE FOUND BY A COURT OR JURY TO BE JUST."]. THE REMAINDER OF THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE COURT'S RULING ON THE DEMURRER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCULMAN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Rocky Ortega, Esq. , 408-667-4313, for Plaintiff Ricardo Figueiredo
Stephen Passalacqua. Esq., Law Offices of Stephen Passalacqua, , 707-433-1099, Law Offices of Stephen Passalacqua for Defendant Amanda De Joinvile

ARGUED. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AMANDA DE JOINVILLE's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT:

(See word minutes for complete details)

Defendant's demurrer to the complaint is sustained with 20 days leave to amend as to the first, second and fourth causes of action. All three causes of action are premised on an alleged false promise to marry, which is not actionable under California law. Plaintiff has pled a single viable cause of action for a gift in contemplation of marriage under Civil Code section 1590, which Defendant has not challenged. Order is signed. Judge: Ethan P. Sculman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

Defendant Amanda De Joinvilles Notice Of Motion, Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Rocky Ortega, Esq. , 408-667-4313, for Plaintiff Ricardo Figueiredo
Stephen Passalacqua. Esq., Law Offices of Stephen Passalacqua ,, 707-433-1099, Law Offices of Stephen Passalacqua for Defendant amanda De Joinvile

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AMANDA DE JOINVILLE's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint:

Defendant's motion to strike damages is granted in part. Plaintiff's prayer for punitive, special, and general damages is stricken. Punitive damages are not available for a violation of Civil Code section 1590. (Civ. Code sec. 1590 ["the donor may recover such gift or such part of its value as may, under all of the circumstances of the case, be found by a court or jury to be just."]. The remainder of the motion to strike is off calendar as moot in light of the Court's ruling on the demurrer. Order is signed. Judge: Ethan P. Sculman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Continued To Feb-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
